SAFE. Sponsorship=YES question not reached (would be on Questionnaire step after resume upload).

scope_fit_note: PARTIAL FIT / STRETCH on the domain. The role's spine (own full program lifecycle intake->post-launch, facilitate recurring ceremonies, action/decision logs, cross-functional coordination across Marketing/Legal/CX/Engineering/Sales, exec-facing status reports, risk escalation, manage multiple concurrent programs) maps WELL to Jamie's InGenius experience (manages 20+ programs/10+ vendors end-to-end, cross-functional SOPs, needs assessments, 15+ program launches). The genuine gap: she lacks specific 'New Product Introduction / go-to-market / commercialization' PRODUCT-launch experience — hers is program/education launches, not SaaS product NPI. Honest STRETCH, not a hard stop. Applied per recalibrated rules.

blockers: RESUME UPLOAD REQUIRED (red asterisk, 'Attachment: *') — MCP file_upload is sandboxed: only files explicitly shared with the session may be uploaded. ADDRESS LINE 1 REQUIRED (red asterisk) — Jamie's exact street address is NOT stored in any repo file (profile_compact, references, master_tracker, prior SUBMITTED.json files only ever had City/State/Zip). Did NOT fabricate a street address (RULE 0).
